title: Middle East crisis live: US launches new round of airstrikes to ‘swiftly punish’ Iran after American troops killed
summary_full: Fresh attacks comes after Iran’s supreme leader warned Washington would pay for ‘seeking to escalate’ the conflictTwo US troops killed and one missing in Jordan after Iranian attacksThe US embassy in Jordan has said authorities evacuated the international airport and seaport in the Jordanian city of Aqaba because of a “specific and credible threat”.In a statement, the US embassy, based in the capital Amman, “strongly” advises all Americans to avoid travelling to the airport and seaport, adding that they should follow Jordanian authorities’ “security directives” and also avoid travel to military bases in Jordan. Continue reading...
